update_state_merged_closeout_sync.assertion: merged-but-not-completed closeout state keeps the stable contract, run contract, run projection, and compatibility state aligned, including merge_queue or completed checkpoint truth

record_event_contract_sync.assertion: record-event refreshes the stable feature-root contract instead of leaving it stale behind the live run artifacts

mark_complete_negative.assertion: mark-complete still rejects unresolved local-target sync truth while the pre-completion merge step remains internally consistent

mark_complete_positive.route: update-state(merged closeout with recorded sync) -> mark-complete
mark_complete_positive.assertion: mark-complete still succeeds once merge truth and recorded sync truth are both present, and all live contract artifacts stay aligned after completion

live_resync.route: update-state(current closeout state) -> live contract or projection refresh
live_resync.assertion: the worktree ends with the canonical feature-root contract resynced to the actual live closeout-pending state after the helper fix
